synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2707 Important: Oracle Linux 9 gimp security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2707

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2707.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
gimp-3.0.4-1.el9_7.3.x86_64.rpm
gimp-libs-3.0.4-1.el9_7.3.i686.rpm
gimp-libs-3.0.4-1.el9_7.3.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
gimp-3.0.4-1.el9_7.3.aarch64.rpm
gimp-libs-3.0.4-1.el9_7.3.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/gimp-3.0.4-1.el9_7.3.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-15059




Description of changes:

[2:3.0.4-1.3]
- fix CVE-2025-15059
